verdicts.title: api-types is a ~9.6k-LOC hand-maintained dual-write with drift tests for only 4 enum tuples
verdicts.note: Dual-write is stated verbatim (SPEC.md:27-33, README.md:7) and the only cross-language check is test_api_type_contracts.py:15-31 which set-compares just RUNTIME_API_EVENT_TYPES/RUNTIME_EVENT_SOURCES/RUNTIME_ACTIVITY_KINDS/AGENT_RUN_STATUSES; backend files self-declare mirrors (home/routes.py:48). The '54 files' count is ~46 by grep, a minor overstatement that does not weaken the finding.

verdicts.title: All four tier-1 surface renderers are registered but unreachable at runtime (mounted by neither app)
verdicts.note: The thread-canvas subtree IS mounted by the desktop app: bootstrap.tsx:247 mounts DestinationOutlet whose default 'run' slug (AppRail.tsx:21 BRAND_DESTINATION='run') renders RunBinder->RunDestination.tsx:572 <ThreadCanvas> -> ThreadCanvas.tsx:244 <TcSurfaceMount> -> TcSurfaceMount.tsx:240 resolveAdapter, and registerAll() at bootstrap.tsx:45 populates exactly that registry — so the adapters are reachable when a run is active, not 'serve tests only'; the cited DestinationOutlet.tsx:23-24 comment describes RunDestination (PR-3.5, shipped) using ThreadCanvas, not future work.

verdicts.title: api-types reaches across the package boundary with a relative filesystem JSON import
verdicts.note: adapterAllowlist.ts:10 imports ../../service-contracts/src/copilot_service_contracts/adapter_allowlist.json while api-types/package.json declares no service-contracts dependency (only devDeps at :12-15); service-contracts is Python-only (no npm package.json) so it can't even be a proper npm dep, and apps/frontend/Dockerfile:16 copies the src tree uncommented — a genuine invisible build contract.

verdicts.title: Accent/theme unions hand-duplicated between api-types and design-system
Hand-rolled SSE parser only recognizes LF-LF frame boundaries
IpcTransport hand-validates a shape its own zod schema already defines
Root docs claim audit-chain is 'shared Python + TS' but no TS implementation exists
surface-renderers hardcodes a dark-only hex palette + px type against the token-SoT rule
Six unreferenced font assets (~123KB) ship in design-system
surface-renderers declares chat-transport as runtime dep whose only import is a lint-negative fixture
api-types/src/index.ts is a 3,978-line monolith while newer contracts follow file-per-domain
Minor cross-language string duplication and stale comments
design-system has zero automated tests for behavioral primitives
